creator: tundra@tundraware.com
text:
On 05/03/2013 04:45 PM, Raphael Kubo da Costa wrote:
> Can you please submit a patch file with all these changes together? It
> makes easier for people to apply and commit it.
>

diff -urN /usr/ports/sysutils/tbku/Makefile tbku/Makefile
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/tbku/Makefile   2012-11-17 00:01:47.000000000 -0600
+++ tbku/Makefile       2013-04-01 17:18:42.000000000 -0500
@@ -2,11 +2,11 @@
  # Date Created:                                19 March 2008
  # Whom:                                        tundra
  #
-# $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/tbku/Makefile,v 1.2 2012/11/17 06:01:47 svnexp Exp $
+# $FreeBSD$
  #
  
  PORTNAME=      tbku
-PORTVERSION=   1.115
+PORTVERSION=   1.117
  CATEGORIES=    sysutils
  MASTER_SITES=  http://www.tundraware.com/Software/tbku/
  
diff -urN /usr/ports/sysutils/tbku/distinfo tbku/distinfo
--- /usr/ports/sysutils/tbku/distinfo   2011-03-19 07:33:26.000000000 -0500
+++ tbku/distinfo       2013-04-02 11:11:51.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (tbku-1.115.tar.gz) = 4f3d9879f9dc2d8b0fe60d9edfeca8751b67c39d5d118d783fcba3570b4a69f3
-SIZE (tbku-1.115.tar.gz) = 509504
+SHA256 (tbku-1.117.tar.gz) = ea3f2bd1611e4a80bf4422c89f9a6a1e7e41c6c8fe4c0e4f3d2e04231eb00f67
+SIZE (tbku-1.117.tar.gz) = 634957
